description_long: This cash register features a robust, angular body with a predominantly gray exterior and a slightly recessed black section at the front, likely for user interaction. The top surface includes a raised, rectangular display screen with a blue-tinted interface, suggesting a digital or touchscreen readout. Flanking the display are sloped surfaces that transition into a flat workspace, possibly for handling cash or receipts. The sides are solid and blocky, providing structural stability and a modern, utilitarian appearance. The rear is plain and unadorned, indicating that all interactive elements are positioned at the front. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible keypad or branding, and the materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metallic or composite elements.
description: A modern, angular cash register with a blue-tinted display screen and a sturdy gray and black body. The design is minimalistic, with all interactive features concentrated at the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue display screen, recessed black interaction area, and sloped surfaces leading to a flat workspace.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the depth of the register, the angled top, and the layered construction of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view is plain and featureless, emphasizing the solid gray back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angled top and the recessed black section at the front.
